keyPoints: Use Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) or Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks for time series forecasting
Choose the right architecture: consider the size and variability of the data
Use techniques like normalization and feature scaling to improve model performance
Experiment with different optimizers and learning rates to find the best combination
Use techniques like moving averages and exponential smoothing to preprocess the data
Evaluate performance using metrics such as MAE, MSE, and MAPE
